svg.aria-label: BobaLink Browser Extension System Architecture Diagram
svg.text: Docker Compose: services + networks + volumes + health checks + restart policies
① Content Script scans DOM → ② Magnet/torrent links detected → ③ Background SW receives message → ④ BobaAPIClient sends HTTP request
⑤ Boba Service (FastAPI/Go) validates → ⑥ qBitTorrent WebUI API receives add request → ⑦ Torrent added to client → ⑧ Status returned to Popup
① User opens context menu on Tab Group → ② Background SW queries chrome.tabGroups → ③ chrome.tabs.query for each group
④ Content Script injected per tab → ⑤ All torrents collected → ⑥ Batch API call to Boba Service → ⑦ All torrents added to qBitTorrent
HTTPS for all external communication | Credentials stored with chrome.storage.local | Offscreen document for crypto operations
Retry queue for offline scenarios | Rate limiting | CSP headers | Permission validation for all API calls
